title: Generated Adapter No Direct Edit Closeout
summary: #361 added no-direct-edit guidance to generated CLI adapter output and focused tests that keep source-contract, runtime-implementation, and regeneration routing visible. #362 remains open for planning/memory command surface expansion, and #356 remains open as the parent lane.
